arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta provides update on injured Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard as he reveals playmaker has suffered 'quite significant' ankle ligament damage
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN IN BERGAMO: Martin Odegaard has sustained 'significant' damage to an ankle ligament which will see him out for a 'while', revealed Mikel Arteta on Wednesday.
